title: Corporate existence of board of education not to be discontinued
doc_html:
§2162.  Corporate existence of board of education not to be discontinued

The corporate existence of the Louisiana State Board of Education shall not be discontinued as long as any of the obligations, or the interest thereon, issued under the authority of this Sub-part remain unpaid.
doc_text:
§2162.  Corporate existence of board of education not to be discontinued
The corporate existence of the Louisiana State Board of Education shall not be discontinued as long as any of the obligations, or the interest thereon, issued under the authority of this Sub-part remain unpaid.
